# Dependencies for kitty-config.
#
# Syntax:
#   plain-name      -> depends_on "name" in the formula
#   cask:NAME       -> brew install --cask NAME, run by kitty-config-setup
#
# Casks are NOT declared in the formula because depends_on cask: is
# unreliable across Homebrew versions. setup.sh installs them at user
# level instead, which works on any system that has brew.

cask:font-fira-code-nerd-font
